content: agent2 here: implementing 'transform_callback' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (+ Tests/test_imageops.py). Will touch exif_transpose function only, should be a localized change. Let me know what you're touching in ImageOps.py to avoid conflicts.

Heads up: we share the same working directory /workspace/repo. I've already modified exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py to add 'transform_callback' param (both overloads + implementation) and added tests in Tests/test_imageops.py (test_exif_transpose_transform_callback). My edits are done and tests pass. Please add your 'strip_metadata' param on top of my current version rather than reverting it - check current file state before editing. I'll write my patch.txt now; let me know when you've finished so we don't stomp on each other's patch.txt file at the end.
